# Belpatra Restaurant & Hotel — Orchha, Madhya Pradesh

> Orchha's highest-rated 100% pure vegetarian hotel & restaurant, 3 minutes from Ram Raja Temple. 4.8★ on Google with 1400+ reviews.

## About
- Name: Belpatra Restaurant & Hotel
- Location: Main Road, Near Ram Raja Temple, Orchha, Madhya Pradesh 472246, India
- Phone: +91 84005 98882, +91 84005 28885
- Email: belpatra2024@gmail.com
- Hours: 9:00 AM – 11:00 PM, open every day
- Cuisine: 100% Pure Vegetarian, Sattvic, Indian
- Rating: 4.8/5 on Google (1400+ reviews)
